title: leucosedum album
intro: Leucosedum album, also known as Edelweiss, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the gentian family and is native to the European Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Leucosedum album include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Leucosedum album can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
